title: It’s finally time for Robinson Crusoe
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iEHsfr9bvpg

Daniel (@dungeondive) has wanted to learn **Robinson Crusoe: Adventures on the Cursed Island** for years, and in this brief clip he shares that the moment has finally come — a copy set up and ready to play and learn.

It's a short note rather than a full review: he expects to love it, drawn by its heavy dose of adventure and the many random elements he so enjoys in a game. Consider this the teaser before the deep dive.

----

Robinson Crusoe has a reputation as one of the great cooperative survival games — and one of the fiddliest to learn. For those who've played it: did the payoff justify the setup, and what should Daniel watch for on his first island?
